main.name: Jake Polacek
main.occupation: senior studying CS in the College of Engineering
main.description: Following graduation, I will be joining Slack's Product Security Foundations team as an Associate Software Engineer
main.bio: Born and raised in Upstate New York, I've always had an interest in STEM, with CS coming into my life my junior year of high school. Outside of software development, I'm interested in hockey, mechanical keyboards, coffee, hiking, and gaming.
main.contactmessage: Here is where you should write your message to readers to have them get in contact with you.

education.description: Aside from the core CS classes, I completed an external specialization in Law and Society with classes revolving around IP and law in tech. I also had the opportunity to learn about topics including networks, language ond information, computer vision, and cryptography.

work.title: Security Software Engineering Intern
work.description: While working remotely, I worked with the Product Security Foundations team to create an HTML Sanitizer in Hacklang in order to prevent Cross-Site Scripting attacks.

work.title: Electronic Warfare Unit Software Engineering Intern
work.description: Rewrote and extended over 100 C# interfaces to reach compatibility with latest .NET Framework while working on government contracts.

ranks.ranksmessage: Since I started drinking coffee, I've given espressos a shot whenever I could get my hands on one. Check out the 'Espresscapade' espresso rankings thus far!

coffees.name: McDonald's - Stazione di Santa Maria Novella

projects.title: A Promised Land
projects.author: Barack Obama
projects.category: The first of two memoirs from the 44th POTUS, focusing on Obama's life from childhood to early career, from to his state senate campaign to the end of his first term as president.

projects.title: Atomic Habits
projects.author: James Clear
projects.category: Transform your life with tiny changes in behaviour – starting now.People think that when you want to change your life, you need to think big. But world-renowned habits expert James Clear has discovered another way.

projects.title: Slaughterhouse-Five
projects.author: Kurt Vonnegut
projects.category: Also known as The Children's Crusade: A Duty-Dance with Death, this is a science fiction infused anti-war novel by Kurt Vonnegut, first published in 1969.

projects.title: Antisocial
projects.author: Andrew Marantz
projects.category: A deeply immersive chronicle of how the optimistic entrepreneurs of Silicon Valley set out to create a free and democratic internet–and how the cynical propagandists of the alt-right exploited that freedom to propel the extreme into the mainstream.

testimonials.text: Here you should write some nice things that someone has said about you. No lies though, employers can tell when you are lying.

That Tim Baker must be one of the most brilliant developers I've ever met! It is amazing that nobody has hired him yet. Hey you, you should hire this guy, he may be fresh out of University and have zero on the job experience but I am confident that he will be one of your best developers in no time!
